poll.question: Marcus wants to build the stray shelter, even if it means rationing harder. Does he go through with it?

options.label: Yes, build it
options.desc: Love first—they're staying, they're choosing, they can share

options.label: No, wait longer
options.desc: Survival first—secure the group before taking on more

options.label: Ask the group
options.desc: It's everyone's call—no one person decides for all

in_play.label: Speak tonight
in_play.desc: Risk vulnerability; say exactly what you feel
